meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Escape Tutorial Hell for Founders
content.seo_description: Stop watching and start shipping. Master Claude Code skills setup to accelerate your MVP launch. A high-impact guide for AI founders and builders.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a revenue-killing bottleneck. By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from passive consumption to active production. This setup automates your boilerplate, optimizes architectural decision-making, and forces your codebase to evolve in real-time, allowing you to bypass theory and ship functional, monetizable features directly to production.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks consuming tutorials, yet your SaaS remains a collection of disparate snippets in a dusty GitHub repository. The gap between 'knowing how' and 'shipping value' is where most founders die. You are not a student; you are a builder. Every hour spent watching a video is an hour your competitor is out-executing you.

We are shifting the paradigm today. By integrating Claude Code with the Antigravity workflow, we turn your LLM into a senior engineer that doesn't just explain code—it executes, refactors, and deploys it. This is the end of tutorial hell and the beginning of your product's journey toward market validation.

steps.title: Environment Scoping
steps.description: Define the boundaries of your MVP to prevent the LLM from hallucinating unnecessary features. We set the architectural constraints first.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory and define the core technical stack, database schema, and MVP feature set. Create a 'rules.md' file that restricts Claude Code to these specific technologies.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Feed your business logic into the model so it understands your monetization model, not just your syntax.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Ingest my PRD and business requirements. Map these to the existing file structure and suggest a roadmap for the first 3 core endpoints.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to handle the tedious setup of authentication and database connections, freeing you for high-level logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the authentication middleware and boilerplate routes based on the established tech stack. Ensure error handling is production-ready.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate auth and user CRUD routes with tests"

steps.title: Iterative Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Don't just build; optimize. Force the agent to review its own code against performance metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the recently generated code for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks. Refactor to reduce cognitive load and latency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "audit and refactor the last commit for performance"

steps.title: Deployment Automation
steps.description: Bridge the gap between local development and live production by automating your CI/CD pipeline configuration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs our test suite and deploys to Vercel upon merge to main. Ensure environment secrets are handled securely.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "configure github actions for auto-deploy"

pro_tips: Always require a 'Plan-First' mode; never let the AI write code before it outlines the logic in a markdown block.
Use custom system prompts to force the AI to write tests before the feature implementation to ensure TDD compliance.
Keep your context window clean by periodically clearing old logs and unused documentation files from the agent's memory.
Treat the Claude Code CLI as a pair programmer; ask it to explain the 'why' behind its architectural choices to build your own intuition.
Version control your prompts; treat your Antigravity prompts as part of your intellectual property and store them in a /prompts directory.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is automated, focus on shipping your first 'User-Value' feature—the one thing a customer will actually pay for. Don't add features; optimize for conversion.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for tutorials and start building for revenue. Your MVP is only as good as your velocity, and you now have the tools to ship 10x faster. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
